mapper.select: select event_id, callback_event_id, ai_task_id, workflow_task_id, event_status, raw_payload, error_message from audit_workflow_callback_event where callback_event_id = #{callbackEventId} limit 1
mapper.update: update audit_workflow_callback_event set event_status = #{eventStatus}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, update_time = sysdate() where callback_event_id = #{callbackEventId}

update audit_workflow_callback_event set event_status = 'processing', ai_task_id = #{aiTaskId}, workflow_task_id = #{workflowTaskId}, raw_payload = #{rawPayload}, error_message = null, update_time = sysdate() where callback_event_id = #{callbackEventId} and event_status = 'failed'
